global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with product images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a sale.

elements.label: Pink abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant pink background with abstract shapes and patterns creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Main product display
elements.description: A central display featuring three stylized product images with a glossy finish, arranged vertically.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' is prominently displayed in bold, modern typography at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: A stylized product image with a sleek design, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: Another stylized product image, slightly larger, also centered in the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A clear and inviting message stating 'New collection drop Shop bestsellers now' in a modern font at the bottom.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in bold, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' in a bold font, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, positioned at the top right corner with the word 'SALE'.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element that does not fit into the other categories, possibly decorative.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main product images are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
